title: Constant Contact vs SendGrid (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Constant Contact vs SendGrid: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Constant Contact vs SendGrid: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Constant Contact and SendGrid comes down to your specific use case. Constant Contact is built for nonprofits and local businesses, while SendGrid targets developers and high-volume senders.
choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on nonprofits and local businesses
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers and high-volume senders

faq.q: Is Constant Contact better than SendGrid?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Constant Contact wins for nonprofits and local businesses, while SendGrid is stronger for developers and high-volume senders.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Constant Contact or SendGrid?
faq.a: Constant Contact starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from SendGrid to Constant Contact?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
